items.title: More than 500 Rohingya vanished at sea - what happened?
items.dek: Two boats carrying an estimated 530 Rohingyas have disappeared since leaving Myanmar on 29 June.
items.body: Two boats carrying an estimated 530 Rohingyas have disappeared since leaving Myanmar on 29 June.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Australia 'deeply frustrated' over Laos methanol poisoning charges
items.dek: Media reports say Laos will press charges of up to one year in jail against those allegedly responsible.
items.body: Media reports say Laos will press charges of up to one year in jail against those allegedly responsible.
